name: Tony's Vegeatble Tuna Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a flameproof 3-quart casserole.
2. Add scallions and rice; cook, stirring frequently, until rice is golden brown.
3. Stir in vegetable broth; bring to a boil. Turn off heat.
4. Cover and bake in preheated 375°F oven for 45 minutes.
5. Remove casserole from oven; stir in salt, Tabasco sauce, sunflower seeds, carrots, zucchini, and broccoli.
6. Return to oven; bake for 20 to 25 minutes longer.
7. Just before serving, mix in tuna.
